purpose: Define key terms, acronyms, and concepts used in the story — enabling readers to understand specialized vocabulary without leaving the page.
writingRules: Each definition must be 1–2 sentences, maximum 50 words
Define acronyms even if expanded in text (readers may skip ahead)
Use plain language — define technical terms with everyday equivalents
Link to relevant sections in the story where the term is used
Alphabetical order for more than 5 terms
seoRules: Glossary terms should be linked inline from body text
Each term page eligible for its own featured snippet
